notes: Mirrors forge's voice_pipeline_state.json shape so Forge's heartbeat module can drive it cross-project. Scribe-side updates this file when state changes (gpu_state, last_action, tier transitions). systemd timer fires every 30s; tier decides emit vs skip. Cadences: T0=30s, T1=90s, T2=270s, T3=1200s.
